options.name: --arcpath
options.description:
specify path to an ARC (ARC directory or
`arc-ro-crate-metadata.json`)

options.name: --outpath
options.description:
specify a file path and name to write results to
(Default: `<path/to/ARC/arc-mermaid>.md or .mmd`)

options.name: --outputmmd
options.description: whether to output a .mmd file instead of markdown

options.name: --samplenumbers
options.description:
whether to add the number of samples between
processes to edges

options.name: --flowdirection
options.description:
specify the direction of the flowchart: `topDown`
(Default) or `leftRight`
